text: Plugin Request: Include checks for BEAST

author: feralfenrir
text: I want to suggest an additional feature of highlight CBC ciphers on TLS 1.0 and lower as vulnerable to BEAST

author: nabla-c0d3
text: Sure - this is more of a UI issue as SSLyze already checks for that. Closing this as a duplicate of [#111](https://github.com/nabla-c0d3/sslyze/issues/111).
